title: Sardinian Trofie with Smoky Lemon Sauce
description: A refreshing summer pasta dish from Sardinia, featuring smoky flavors and a tangy lemon sauce. Trofie pasta pairs perfectly with the delicate and smoky ingredients.

ingredients.name: delicate herbs (such as parsley or basil)

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the trofie pasta according to the package instructions.
In a blender or food processor, combine smoked olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic, and a pinch of salt.
Blend the mixture until smooth and emulsified.
In a large skillet, heat the smoky lemon sauce over medium heat.
Add the cooked trofie pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
